EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} deleted the directory "{object.fullpath}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} created the directory "{object.fullpath}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to delete the directory "{object.fullpath}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to create the directory "{object.fullpath}" on host {event_src.host}
